title: 2025-11-06 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 15.61
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-11-06: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 15.61/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-11-06, the score printed 15.61/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
